name: MCP Usage Log
description: Aggregate per-tool call counter shared by all workbench MCP servers. Each server records every tools/call into a single machine-wide JSON file.
guidelines: recordToolUse(server, tool) is fire-and-forget — never await it, never let it throw.
Call recordToolUse once per tools/call, right after extracting the tool name.
Writes are atomic (temp file + rename) and serialized per-process via a promise chain.
anti_patterns: Do not block or fail a tool call on usage-logging errors.
Do not store per-call detail (args, timestamps, history) — counts only by design.
decisions: Global per-user file, not per-repo: sidesteps that cw-ast/cw-notify often lack a repo path.
Lost increments from cross-process read-modify-write races are accepted — counters tolerate it.
